(DEVICE FILE: IMX347-LQR-C_1_IMX347-LQR-C_IMX)

PACKAGE 'IMX347-LQR-C'
CLASS IC
PINCOUNT 132

PINORDER 'IMX347-LQR-C_1_IMX347-LQR-C_IMX' ASMON DMCKM DMCKP DMOM1 DMOM2 DMOM3 DMOM4 DMOP1 DMOP2,
      DMOP3 DMOP4 INCK NC1 NC10 NC11 NC12 NC13 NC14 NC15 NC16 NC17 NC18 NC19 NC2 NC20 NC21 NC22 NC23,
      NC24 NC25 NC26 NC27 NC28 NC29 NC3 NC30 NC31 NC32 NC33 NC34 NC35 NC36 NC37 NC38 NC39 NC4 NC40,
      NC41 NC42 NC43 NC44 NC45 NC46 NC47 NC48 NC49 NC5 NC50 NC51 NC52 NC53 NC54 NC55 NC6 NC7 NC8 NC9,
      SCL SDA SLAMODE0 SLAMODE1 TENABLE TEST1 TEST2 TOUT VBGR VDDHCM1 VDDHCM2 VDDHCP VDDHDA VDDHPX1,
      VDDHPX2 VDDHPX3 VDDHPX4 VDDLCN1 VDDLCN2 VDDLIF1 VDDLIF2 VDDLPLA1 VDDLPLA2 VDDLPLD VDDLSC1,
      VDDLSC2 VDDLSC3 VDDLSC4 VDDLSC5 VDDMIO1 VDDMIO2 VDDSUB VLOADLM VRLFR VRLST VSSHCP VSSHDA,
      VSSHPX1 VSSHPX2 VSSHPX3 VSSHPX4 VSSHPX5 VSSHPX6 VSSHPX7 VSSHPX8 VSSLCB1 VSSLCB2 VSSLCN1,
      VSSLCN2 VSSLIF1 VSSLIF2 VSSLIF3 VSSLPLA1 VSSLPLA2 VSSLPLD VSSLSC1 VSSLSC2 VSSLSC3 VSSLSC4,
      VSSLSC5 XCLR XHS XMASTER XTRIG XVS
FUNCTION G1 'IMX347-LQR-C_1_IMX347-LQR-C_IMX' A4 M5 N5 M6 M4 M7 M3 N6 N4 N7 N3 N9 A1 C5 C6 C7 C8 C9,
      C10 C11 D3 D4 D5 A12 D6 D7 D8 D9 D10 D11 E3 E10 E11 F3 N1 F11 G3 G4 G9 G10 G11 G12 H3 H4 H11,
      N12 J3 J6 J7 J10 J11 K3 K4 K5 K6 K7 A9 K8 K9 K10 K11 L3 L11 B3 B9 C3 C4 J2 F1 G2 D2 C2 E1 H1,

PACKAGEPROP PART_NAME 'IMX347-LQR-C_1'
